messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

REL-YAR-079 transfer release explicitly marks YAR-RISK-2 authority as pending. STD-YAR-079-P controls execution gate. Dependency resolved: planning-vs-execution distinction correctly applied by worker.

full_latest_gov_baton.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton.
full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Gate PASSED with zero failures. Artifact verdict ESCALATE is supported by unambiguous source evidence. REL-YAR-079 explicitly states workspace YAR-RISK-2 transfer authority remains PENDING. STD-YAR-079-P requires all five elements (dataset, destination workspace, recipient entity, export date, transfer authority) closed before execution. Missing transfer authority is a binary defect not reparable by additional worker processing. Action boundary remains open.

final_compiler_payload.verdict_rationale: STD-YAR-079-P requires exact match of dataset DS-19, recipient Yara Analytics, export date 2026-06-28, destination workspace YAR-RISK-2, AND transfer authority. REL-YAR-079 confirms four elements match but explicitly marks transfer authority pending. DES-YAR-079 is planning-only and cannot substitute. Boundary remains open; action may not proceed.

  },

    "STD-YAR-079-P",

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

internal_documents.content: Export EXP-YAR-079 transfers dataset DS-19 to workspace YAR-RISK-2 for Yara Analytics on 2026-06-28.
Design review DES-YAR-079 approves workspace architecture for planning only and is not transfer execution authority.
Transfer release REL-YAR-079 covers dataset DS-19 and Yara Analytics for export date 2026-06-28; workspace YAR-RISK-2 transfer authority remains pending.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Regulated data export is complete only when transfer release matches dataset, destination workspace, recipient entity, export date, and transfer authority before execution.
